scripts.build: bun run build:clean && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && bun build ./src/index.ts --bundle --target=node --format=cjs --outfile=dist/index.cjs
scripts.build:clean: bun -e "import { rmSync } from 'node:fs'; try { rmSync('dist', { recursive: true }); } catch {}"
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run build && bun run typecheck && bun test
